fix: restore template-managed files missing from target during sync (#375)

* Initial plan

* fix: restore template-managed files missing from target after sync

When the template snapshot is unchanged since the last sync (no diff to
apply), `_merge_with_base` returns early without copying any files.
If template-managed files were absent from the target repository they
were silently filtered out of the lock instead of being restored.

After the merge/copy step in `_sync_merge`, check for any materialized
files that are absent from the target and copy them from the upstream
snapshot. This covers both the "template unchanged" and the
"changes applied" paths.

Fixes the warning:
  "N file(s) in lock absent from target and excluded: ..."

commit.message:
feat: add decode support for FIELD_INDEX, VARIABLE, DECIMAL, ISO_NAME, and DYNAMIC_FIELD types

Add Jinja2 template handlers for 7 previously unsupported PGN field types:
- FIELD_INDEX: decoded as a numeric index value
- VARIABLE: consumes all remaining bits in the message
- DECIMAL: BCD-encoded values using decode_decimal()
- ISO_NAME: 64-bit ISO NAME identifiers

commit.message:
fix: Remove conflicting server/vercel.json

The server/vercel.json was routing ALL requests (/) to server.js,
which overrode the root vercel.json configuration that properly
separates API (/api/* → Node.js) from frontend (/* → React).

This caused 'DEPLOYMENT_NOT_FOUND' errors because Vercel couldn't
properly route requests.

Solution: Use only root vercel.json which has:
- @vercel/node for server/server.js (API endpoints)
- @vercel/static-build for client (React frontend)
- Proper routing: /api/* → server, /* → client/dist

One-shot prompts now include fetched issue context and provider runs receive autoPr/autoShip options. Helper utilities (formatAge, fetchIssueContext, subcommand handlers) added.

commit.message:
MYTUBE-79 Test: Update video record on success — database fields populated correctly after transcoding (#314)

* MYTUBE-79 test: automate Test: Update video record on success — database fields populated correctly after transcoding

* MYTUBE-79: fix test video duration and Cloud Run job env vars

Three issues prevented the test from passing:

1. Test video source duration was 2 s (color=...d=2) with -shortest flag,
   so -t 10 had no effect — the generated MP4 was still only 2 s.
   The transcoder extracts a thumbnail at offset 5 s; no frame exists,
   ffmpeg exits 0 but writes no file, upload then fails.
   Fixed by setting d=10 in the lavfi color source and removing -shortest.

2. CDN_BASE_URL was not forwarded to the Cloud Run Job via --update-env-vars,
   so the transcoder used the value baked into the job config rather than
   the one the test derives expected_thumbnail_url from.
   Fixed by adding CDN_BASE_URL to the env-var override list.

3. DB_DSN=host=127.0.0.1 was being injected into the Cloud Run Job,
   overriding the INSTANCE_UNIX_SOCKET path already configured on the job.
   The job cannot reach 127.0.0.1 (the local Cloud SQL proxy in the test
   runner), so every DB write failed. Fixed by removing DB_DSN from the
   override list; the job now uses its own INSTANCE_UNIX_SOCKET connection.

Result: 7 / 7 assertions pass in 86.95 s.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
